variants: Uliana Frolova is known for her groundbreaking invention, the Divining Lantern Mechanism, designed to aid navigation in darkness. She was born in Dawnfeather Point and has since moved to Novafern Isle, where she continues to pursue her passion for invention. An active participant in the Owlshade Watchers Fellowship, she connects with others who share her fascination for the natural world. In recognition of her innovative work, Uliana received the Stellar Ember Distinction, celebrating her contributions to the field.

As a committed member of the Owlshade Watchers Fellowship, she engages with fellow enthusiasts, deepening her understanding of the natural world. Her achievements have been acknowledged through the Stellar Ember Distinction, marking a noteworthy accomplishment in her career.
